reviewFlags: English product copy is sparse; caption uses generated brand copy.
Stock is 0 or not set; confirm availability before publishing.
AI/local generated scenes require visual review before Instagram/Facebook posting.
Arabic phrase is a candidate only; human proofreading required.

publishing.arabicNote: Arabic short phrase is a candidate only. Human proofreading required before publishing.

images.prompt:
Use case: ads-marketing
Asset type: Instagram and Facebook 4:5 feed image, 1080x1350 final crop
Primary request: Create a NURA soft-luxury jewelry social image for Hero product scene.
Input image: image/产品提取图/BB01-product-warmwhite.jpg is the product identity reference. Preserve the exact jewelry shape, gemstone placement, gold tone, and recognisable product details.
Subject: NURA Gemstone Earrings BB01, Earrings, SKU NURA-EAR-SEED-BB01, published product.
Scene/backdrop: warm white editorial product scene with soft marble, quiet gold accents, and generous whitespace.
Brand style: warm white background, high whitespace, clean typography area, premium black and soft gold accents, modern Middle Eastern feminine elegance.
Avoid: black heavy luxury background, saturated colors, red discount visuals, cheap collage, sparkle rain, exaggerated filters, product deformation, fake extra stones, incorrect jewelry category.
No large promotional discount text. Keep the image quiet, polished, editorial, and directly usable as a social media draft.
